title: Anthony Rodia Totally Relatable
overview: In Anthony Rodia's first stand up special, "Totally Relatable" is a comedic journey exploring the chaos of parenting, marital spats, and grappling with societies stupidity. Anthony navigates the absurdities of daily life, being raised by immigrant parents, and trying to uphold an old school way of raising kids.
